question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_5 AS T1 JOIN table_6 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_3 = 4 ORDER BY T2.col_5 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_5 AS T1 JOIN table_6 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_3 = 4 ORDER BY T2.col_5 DESC LIMIT 1;
